evals.prompt:
Add Auth0 authentication to an Expo (React Native) application using the react-native-auth0 SDK.

**Auth0 Credentials:**
- Domain: `dev-example.auth0.com`
- Client ID: `abc123def456ghi789jkl012`
evals.expected_output: Working Expo (React Native) app with Auth0 Web Auth login, secure credential storage, and user profile display
expectations: Auth0 SDK installed via any valid method (npx expo install react-native-auth0)
Auth0 SDK initialized (Auth0Provider or useAuth0 hook)
Uses secure credential storage (getCredentials or credentialsManager)
Auth0 domain dev-example.auth0.com written to app.json config file
Client ID abc123def456ghi789jkl012 present in application code
Does not use SPA SDK (@auth0/auth0-react, @auth0/auth0-spa-js) in native app
Does not use localhost callback in native app
No client secret in native app
Solution correctly integrates Auth0 into Expo app with login, logout, credential storage, and customScheme configuration
Uses current SDK version (v5.5.0) in dependency declaration
Configures customScheme for Expo callback URL redirection
Uses typed Auth0 error handling (WebAuthErrorCodes or CredentialsManagerErrorCodes)
Does not use deprecated expo-auth-session (uses react-native-auth0 instead)
Uses at least 2 skill-specific advanced patterns beyond basic SDK usage
